metadata.description: MCP-to-skill generation from governed MCP descriptors into v2 skill definitions.
metadata.summary: Generate v2 skill definitions from governed MCP descriptors.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Generate Skills From MCP Descriptor
capabilities.description: Generate v2 skill definitions from a governed MCP descriptor.

parameters.name: descriptor
parameters.description: Path to a governed MCP descriptor used as the generation source.

parameters.name: outputDir
parameters.description: Optional output directory for generated v2 skill definition artifacts.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Allow overwriting generated skill files when an output directory is provided.

output.description: Skill-generation report including generated v2 skills, skipped tools, and written files.

constraints.description: This surface generates skill artifacts from governed MCP descriptor inputs only.

triggers.description: When governed skill artifacts need to be generated from an MCP descriptor.
When a bounded MCP slice should be projected into v2 skill definitions.
